content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.29% with mixed sector action — Realty (+2.15%), Pharma (+0.65%), Metal (+0.81%) leading; IT (-1.19%) lagging. VIX at 18.65 elevated. Book is well-diversified across 10 names at 52% deployed. Focus this tick is risk management on existing positions — trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +6%, ADANIPORTS +2%) and avoid adding cluster risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +6% unrealized. SL already at 1025 (~+4.2% above entry, locks in ~4% gain). CMP 1040 vs SL 1025 gives 1.4% trail-gap — already tight enough; raising further (e.g., to 1033) would put SL within 0.7% of CMP and risk intraday-noise stopout given today's -1.2% fade off morning high. Keeping current SL/target unchanged. Emitting MODIFY as no-op equivalent — actually correcting to HOLD since values are unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge -2.3%. SL at 119 vs CMP 122.21 gives ~2.6% buffer. Gold thesis intact (CB buying, geopolitical premium, Fed easing path). Holding through to original target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.70,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% unrealized. Current SL 23.85 is ABOVE entry 23.65 and above CMP 23.99 — wait, SL 23.85 < CMP 23.99, so SL is below CMP by 0.6% (acceptable trail-gap). Actually current SL 23.85 is fine; lowering to 23.70 would be loosening which is rejected. Keeping SL at 23.85 — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: stored SL 23.85 vs CMP 23.99 — SL is 0.6% below CMP. Trail-gap is at the minimum 0.5% threshold; raising further would risk noise stopout. Hold current levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.0% unrealized at CMP 1726.40, day high 1748.60. Trailing SL from 1710 → 1715 (still 0.66% below CMP, above entry 1700 = locks in +0.9% min). FY26 record print (500+ MMT, +25% revenue), Apr cargo +15% YoY, Jefferies/MOFSL Rs 1,900 target. Above 52w-high breakout context. Tightening SL while leaving room toward target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% unrealized. Today opened at day high 1600 (intraday 52w-high) then faded to 1530. Q4 results May 14 = binary catalyst within 7-8 sessions. SL 1510 vs CMP 1530 gives ~1.3% buffer. Per Rule 11, will reassess closer to results window — for now thesis intact, stock on SMA-20 (~1424) trend support. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4% unrealized. Sharp intraday reversal from 13976 to 13463 despite record April sales (+33% YoY). SL 13400 vs CMP 13463 — gap only 0.5%, at the trail-gap floor. Volatile auto print + GST tailwind narrative intact. Holding SL where it is; further tightening would self-stop. If breaks 13400 the SL trips cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%. Q4 PAT +69% YoY, GNPA improved 140 bps. Today opened with gap-up to 212.66 then faded to 205.65 — typical post-result profit-taking near 52w high. SL 204 vs CMP 206 gives 1% buffer. Thesis intact; hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%. Stock up +4.34% today on F414 engine deal momentum + new CMD appointment. Strong defence-sector tailwind. SL 4480 vs CMP 4540 gives 1.3% buffer. Citi target 5560 = +22% upside. Hold through momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 502.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% unrealized. Realty sector leader today (+3.29%), data centre/cloud diversification positive. Trailing SL 500 → 502 (1% below CMP 507.05, breakeven plus). Realty sector best-performing today supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% unrealized. Q4 results scheduled May 6, 2026 — binary event in 2 sessions. Per Rule 11, must choose: (a) exit, (b) tighten SL, or (c) reduce size. Position is ~4.8% of capital (130 × 374 = ₹48,620 / ~5% of book) — already at the ≤5% event-trade size threshold. SL 365 vs CMP 369.65 = 1.3% buffer; will hold through with current SL given small position size. If price weakens into close tomorrow, will reassess."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1025 (above entry 984, locks +4.2%). Trail-gap to CMP 1040 = 1.4%. Tightening further risks noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge, SL gives 2.6% buffer, gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "SL at 23.85 vs CMP 23.99 — at minimum trail-gap. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1710 to 1715, locks in +0.9% min. CMP 1726, gap 0.66%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Intraday fade off 52w high; Q4 results May 14. Will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at trail-gap floor; record sales thesis intact, intraday reversal not yet thesis-breaking."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-result profit-taking; +69% PAT thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "+4.34% day, F414 deal catalyst, defence momentum. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 502.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL 500 → 502 (breakeven-plus), realty sector leader today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 6 binary event; position at ≤5% size threshold acceptable per Rule 11(c). Hold with current SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Several pharma names (LALPATHLAB +12.4%, SYNGENE +7.6%, CONCORDBIO +5.5%) printed sharp moves but research flags caution: LALPATHLAB Q4 PAT -15.5% YoY, SYNGENE Q4 PAT -19.3%, CONCORDBIO Citi cut target with 20-23% EPS cuts. The headline price moves are not earnings-supported — pass. ADANIPOWER near 52w high but Power-cluster discipline applies; not adding. BHEL up 10% post-results — extended, would chase. HAL already held provides defence exposure. KOTAKBANK -5% post-results dip not screened today — would need depth on whether NIM trajectory justifies dip-buy.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-distributed: 10 CNC positions, 52% deployed, no cluster concentration. Today's win is risk-management hygiene — trailing SLs on ADANIPORTS and ANANTRAJ to lock in gains, holding through binary events (EXIDEIND May 6, GESHIP May 14) at modest sizes. Avoiding the temptation to chase pharma momentum spikes that aren't earnings-supported. Cumulative P&L +0.46% over 15 days is slow but positive; profit factor 3.5x indicates quality of wins is sound when they hit. No new entries this tick — existing book is the priority and several names need 1-2 sessions to develop."
}
